message:
feat(engine): add centralized RuntimeConfig with TOML loading and batch validation

Introduce RuntimeConfig struct loaded from optional franken-engine.toml,
replacing scattered hard-coded constants with a centralized, TOML-
deserializable, fully-validated configuration. Nested sections cover:

- ExecutionConfig, OrchestratorConfig, BayesianPriorsConfig
- DecisionThresholdsConfig, ContainmentConfig, GuardplaneConfig
- GovernanceConfig, GatesConfig, OptimizationConfig, ExtensionHostConfig

Defaults are byte-identical to prior compile-time constants. Validation
reports all constraint violations at once rather than failing on the
first. Includes ~420 lines of tests covering defaults, TOML/JSON
round-trips, partial configs, and validation edge cases.

lib.rs updated with `pub mod runtime_config;` declaration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
